hero.title: Speak English with Confidence
hero.subtitle: Join our community to practice speaking, build your fluency, and meet new friends in a supportive environment.

seasonOne.title: Season One Highlights
seasonOne.subtitle: A quick look at our journey so far—from small meetups to high-energy group discussions.

why.title: Why Join Us?
why.subtitle: Real practice happens outside the classroom. Here is why members love us.

speaking.title: Real Practice
speaking.desc: Actually use your vocabulary in natural, daily conversations.

friends.title: New Connections
friends.desc: Meet people who share your passion for learning and growth.

safe.title: Zero Fear
safe.desc: A friendly space where making mistakes is just part of the fun.

critical.title: Communication Skills
critical.desc: Improve your ability to express opinions and engage in debates.

games.title: Fun Learning
games.desc: Group games and activities that break the ice and keep things lively.

noJudgment.title: Non-Judgmental
noJudgment.desc: Everyone is here to grow. You’ll feel supported from day one.

suggest.title: Shape Future Events
suggest.subtitle: Have a topic in mind? We design our sessions based on member interests.

collaborate.title: Work With Us
collaborate.subtitle: Passionate about hosting, photography, or content? Join our volunteer team.

sponsorship.title: Brand Partnerships
sponsorship.subtitle: Connect your brand with an active, educated, and global-minded community.

final.title: Ready to Start?
final.subtitle: No matter your level, there's always a seat for you in our next circle.

moments.title: Captured Moments
moments.subtitle: Glimpses of energy and friendship from our past sessions.

events.title: Upcoming Sessions
events.subtitle: Choose a session and join the conversation.

sponsors.title: Our Supporters
sponsors.subtitle: Brands that believe in the power of community.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.subtitle: The people behind the scenes of our community.

wallet.title: Coin Center
wallet.depositDesc: Coins are used for registrations and passes. They are non-refundable.

subscription.title: Community Pass
subscription.subtitle: Unlock full access using your Talk Coins.
subscription.successDesc: Your community pass is now active.
